content.text:
{"success":true,"process_rule_id":"J09B","process_rule":"Process J09B:

1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table, in the given order:
   3.1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR, else set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   3.2. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 = 0.
   3.3. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 between 500 and 599 (inclusive).
   3.4. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 between 900 and 999 (inclusive).
   3.5. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.
4. Join J09B_temp with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. Join the resulting table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for each ID (per EQUNR / ANLAGE):
   - If sales data is present, keep the sales data and clear (empty) the net data.
   - Otherwise keep the net data and clear (empty) the sales data.
7. For every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024, and
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023,
   set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".
8. Export all rows with ENTSCHEIDUNG = "MANDATORY_READING" from the final table as a CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING, including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send J09B_MANDATORY_READING to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.
10. Export all remaining rows (ENTSCHEIDUNG <> "MANDATORY_READING") as a CSV file named J09B, including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
11. Send the J09B CSV file to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com.
12. Delete the temporary table J09B_temp after exporting and sending all data."}

structured_content.process_rule:
Process J09B:

1. Make a copy of decision_table with TOURS starting with J09B named J09B_temp.
2. Update the table with an additional empty column ENTSCHEIDUNG.
3. Apply the following rules to the joined table, in the given order:
   3.1. Count the number of EQUNR for every HAUS and set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "KSA" if there are less than 3 EQUNR, else set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU".
   3.2. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 = 0.
   3.3. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 between 500 and 599 (inclusive).
   3.4. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with HOUSE_NUM1 between 900 and 999 (inclusive).
   3.5. Set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "EVU" for all houses with address area Wiblingwerde or Breckerfeld.
4. Join J09B_temp with the EABLG table using INSTALLATION.
5. Join the resulting table with the NET_MASTER table and the SALES_MASTER table using EQUNR.
6. Compare sales data and net data for each ID (per EQUNR / ANLAGE):
   - If sales data is present, keep the sales data and clear (empty) the net data.
   - Otherwise keep the net data and clear (empty) the sales data.
7. For every EQUNR in EABL where both conditions hold:
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2024, and
   - ISTABLART_TXT = "Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP" and record created in 2023,
   set ENTSCHEIDUNG to "MANDATORY_READING".
8. Export all rows with ENTSCHEIDUNG = "MANDATORY_READING" from the final table as a CSV file named J09B_MANDATORY_READING, including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
9. Send J09B_MANDATORY_READING to the internal team at mandatory.reading@provider.com.
10. Export all remaining rows (ENTSCHEIDUNG <> "MANDATORY_READING") as a CSV file named J09B, including the columns: `Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.`, `HAUS`, `ANLAGE`, `ME_MA_ID`, `EQUNR`, `HOUSE_NUM1`, `ENTSCHEIDUNG`, `TITLE`, `FORENAME`, `SURNAME`, `STREET`, `STREETNO`, `POST_CODE1`, `CITY1`, `CITY2`, `EMAIL`.
11. Send the J09B CSV file to the EVU team at meter.readings@evu.com.
12. Delete the temporary table J09B_temp after exporting and sending all data.

{"success":true,"schema":"# Table: net_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: sales_master
## column_name (type) description
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
TITLE (TEXT) Title (Mr., Mrs., Dr., etc.)
FORENAME (TEXT) First name
SURNAME (TEXT) Last name/surname
STREET (TEXT) Street name
STREETNO (TEXT) Street number
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EMAIL (TEXT) Email address

# Table: decision_table
## column_name (type) description
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier
ANLAGE (TEXT) Installation/facility identifier
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
TOUR (TEXT) Tour/route identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
CITY1 (TEXT) City name
CITY2 (TEXT) District/additional city information
HOUSE_NUM1 (INTEGER) House/building number
POST_CODE1 (INTEGER) Postal code
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number

# Table: eabl
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
EQUNR (TEXT) Equipment Number
Geplante Ableseart (INTEGER) Planned reading type
MR type (TEXT) Meter reading type code
MR TYPE TEXT (TEXT) Meter Reading type description
MR category (TEXT) Meter reading category
ISTABLART_TXT (TEXT) Actual reading type description (SAP)
LOGIKZW (TEXT) Logic indicator
KENNZIFF (TEXT) Identification number
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date

# Table: eablg
## column_name (type) description
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No. (TEXT) Meter Reading Document Number
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Meter Reading reason (INTEGER) Meter reading reason code
MR Reason - Text (TEXT) Meter reading reason description
Scheduled MR Date (TEXT) Scheduled meter reading date
Meter Reading unit (TEXT) Meter reading unit
Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No..1 (INTEGER) Secondary/duplicate Meter Reading Document Number

# Table: eanl
## column_name (type) description
Installation (TEXT) Installation identifier
Installation type (TEXT) Type of installation
Record created on (TEXT) Record creation date
Object changed on (TEXT) Object modification date
SPARTE_TEXT (TEXT) Division/sector description
AKLASSE (TEXT) Customer class code
AKLASSE_TEXT (TEXT) Customer class description
TARIFTYP (TEXT) Tariff type code
TARIFTYP_TEXT (TEXT) Tariff type description
BRANCHE (TEXT) Industry/sector code
BRANCHE_TEXT (TEXT) Industry/sector description
ABLEINH (TEXT) Reading unit identifier
ME_MA_ID (TEXT) Meter/Measuring point ID
HAUS (TEXT) House identifier

# Table: process_rules
## column_name (type) description
process_rule_id (TEXT) PRIMARY KEY - Process rule identifier
process_rule (TEXT) NOT NULL - Process rule text/description"}

args.sqlite_command: CREATE TABLE J09B_temp AS SELECT * FROM decision_table WHERE TOUR LIKE 'J09B%';
ALTER TABLE J09B_temp ADD COLUMN ENTSCHEIDUNG TEXT;

WITH eq_count AS (SELECT HAUS, COUNT(DISTINCT EQUNR) AS eq_cnt FROM J09B_temp GROUP BY HAUS) UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = CASE WHEN eq_count.eq_cnt < 3 THEN 'KSA' ELSE 'EVU' END FROM eq_count WHERE J09B_temp.HAUS = eq_count.HAUS;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 = 0;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 500 AND 599;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE HOUSE_NUM1 BETWEEN 900 AND 999;
UPDATE J09B_temp SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'EVU' WHERE CITY1 IN ('Wiblingwerde','Breckerfeld');
CREATE TABLE J09B_step4 AS SELECT t.*, g."Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", g.Installation FROM J09B_temp t LEFT JOIN eablg g ON t.ANLAGE = g.Installation;

CREATE TABLE J09B_step5 AS SELECT s4.*, n.TITLE AS NET_TITLE, n.FORENAME AS NET_FORENAME, n.SURNAME AS NET_SURNAME, n.STREET AS NET_STREET, n.STREETNO AS NET_STREETNO, n.CITY1 AS NET_CITY1, n.CITY2 AS NET_CITY2, n.POST_CODE1 AS NET_POST_CODE1, n.EMAIL AS NET_EMAIL, sm.TITLE AS SALES_TITLE, sm.FORENAME AS SALES_FORENAME, sm.SURNAME AS SALES_SURNAME, sm.STREET AS SALES_STREET, sm.STREETNO AS SALES_STREETNO, sm.CITY1 AS SALES_CITY1, sm.CITY2 AS SALES_CITY2, sm.POST_CODE1 AS SALES_POST_CODE1, sm.EMAIL AS SALES_EMAIL FROM J09B_step4 s4 LEFT JOIN net_master n ON s4.EQUNR = n.EQUNR LEFT JOIN sales_master sm ON s4.EQUNR = sm.EQUNR;

CREATE TABLE J09B_step6 AS SELECT s5.*, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_TITLE ELSE s5.NET_TITLE END AS TITLE, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_FORENAME ELSE s5.NET_FORENAME END AS FORENAME, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_SURNAME ELSE s5.NET_SURNAME END AS SURNAME, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_STREET ELSE s5.NET_STREET END AS STREET, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_STREETNO ELSE s5.NET_STREETNO END AS STREETNO, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_CITY1 ELSE s5.NET_CITY1 END AS CITY1_final, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_CITY2 ELSE s5.NET_CITY2 END AS CITY2_final, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 ELSE s5.NET_POST_CODE1 END AS POST_CODE1_final, CASE WHEN s5.SALES_TITLE IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_FORENAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_SURNAME IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREET IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_STREETNO IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_CITY1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_POST_CODE1 IS NOT NULL OR s5.SALES_EMAIL IS NOT NULL THEN s5.SALES_EMAIL ELSE s5.NET_EMAIL END AS EMAIL_final FROM J09B_step5 s5;
CREATE TABLE J09B_step7 AS SELECT s6.* FROM J09B_step6 s6 LEFT JOIN eabl e ON s6.EQUNR = e.EQUNR;

UPDATE J09B_step7 SET ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING' WHERE EQUNR IN (SELECT e1.EQUNR FROM eabl e1 JOIN eabl e2 ON e1.EQUNR = e2.EQUNR WHERE e1.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND e2.ISTABLART_TXT = 'Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP' AND substr(e1."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2024' AND substr(e2."Record created on", 1, 4) = '2023');

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_final AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_final AS CITY1, CITY2_final AS CITY2, EMAIL_final AS EMAIL FROM J09B_step7 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG = 'MANDATORY_READING';

args.email:
Dear Mandatory Reading Team,

Please find attached the J09B_MANDATORY_READING CSV file containing all meter readings that require mandatory reading, as per process J09B.

Best regards,
Automated Meter Reading System

args.sql_query: SELECT "Meter Reading (MR) Doc. No.", HAUS, ANLAGE, ME_MA_ID, EQUNR, HOUSE_NUM1, ENTSCHEIDUNG, TITLE, FORENAME, SURNAME, STREET, STREETNO, POST_CODE1_final AS POST_CODE1, CITY1_final AS CITY1, CITY2_final AS CITY2, EMAIL_final AS EMAIL FROM J09B_step7 WHERE ENTSCHEIDUNG <> 'MANDATORY_READING' OR ENTSCHEIDUNG IS NULL;

args.email:
Dear EVU Team,

Please find attached the J09B CSV file containing all remaining meter readings that do not require mandatory reading, as per process J09B.

Best regards,
Automated Meter Reading System

kwargs.content:
Process J09B has been executed end‑to‑end.

Key outcomes:
- Created working copy `J09B_temp` from `decision_table` for TOURS starting with `J09B` and applied all ENTSCHEIDUNG rules (KSA/EVU, house number ranges, and Wiblingwerde/Breckerfeld).
- Joined with `EABLG`, `NET_MASTER`, and `SALES_MASTER`, preferring sales data over net data where available.
- Applied the MANDATORY_READING rule based on `EABL` records (Maschinelle Schätzung - SAP in 2023 and 2024 per EQUNR).
- Exported:
  - `J09B_MANDATORY_READING.csv` with 3,444 rows and emailed it to `mandatory.reading@provider.com`.
  - `J09B.csv` with 75,785 remaining rows and emailed it to `meter.readings@evu.com`.
- Dropped the temporary table `J09B_temp` as required.

If you’d like, I can also share the exact SQL used or sample rows from either CSV.
